summary: All three requirements (REQ-97, REQ-98, REQ-99) appear to be implemented in the diff. auth.ts uses btoa consistently across register/login/seedOwnerAccount, all localStorage ops are wrapped in try/catch, LandingPage calls loginUser/registerUser with inline error display and saveSession+onJoin on success, and App.tsx uses a synchronous lazy useState initializer with a stable onJoin callback to update React state without a page reload. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were detected.
